title: extract_api_key falls through silently when Authorization lacks Bearer prefix
description:
## Severity
Minor
## Dimension
security
## Location
src/proxy.rs:1243-1282
## Violation
extract_api_key inspects Authorization header. If present without 'Bearer ' prefix, it logs a warn! and returns None for that header — but then proceeds to try x-api-key. A client that mistakenly sends 'Authorization: sk-xxx' (no Bearer) AND also sends 'x-api-key: yyy' will succeed using the second key with no indication that the first was rejected. Combined with the proxy_chat_completions fallback to provider.api_key, an operator can be billing an unintended key without any audit trail.
## Mandated refactor
On Authorization-prefix-failure, return ProxyError::InvalidBody early so the client sees a 400 with 'Authorization header must use Bearer prefix'. Do not silently fall through to alternate auth schemes when the caller has clearly attempted Authorization.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
